basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India (CBI) Counselor Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website of Central Bank of India. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CBI Counselor Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 45 to 65 years who have Graduate qualification in any discipline from a recognized university along with computer knowledge are eligible to apply for these Counselor vacancies.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from recognized university
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university. Must be computer literate with proficient knowledge of MS Office, internet, and typing in the local language. Excellent communication skill in the local language is essential. Retired/VRS opted Bank Officials of Scale I and above of Nationalized Banks including SBI and RRBs preferred OR Ex-Serviceman/other than Bank Employees having Banking knowledge and completed relevant IIBF certification course. Unblemished service record with at least 10 years of experience as an Officer/permanent employee. Must be a resident of Jalgaon District, Maharashtra.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25000/- per month + Rs. 1000/- per month for Conveyance including Mobile

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Counselor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Bank of India Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Counselor post is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 45 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years for the Counselor position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Counselor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month, with an additional Rs. 1,000/- per month for conveyance, including mobile expenses.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any discipline from a recognized university and possess computer literacy with proficiency in MS Office and the internet.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Counselor post will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Counselor post in Jalgaon, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. Are retired bank officials eligible for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, retired or VRS-opted Bank Officials of Scale I and above from Nationalized Banks, including SBI and RRBs, are preferred.

faq.question: Q10. What are the essential skills required for the Counselor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have proficient knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in the local language, and excellent communication skills in the local language.
